title: hypericum tomentosum var. lusitanicum
intro: Hypericum tomentosum var. lusitanicum, also known as St. John's wort, is a perennial plant in the St. John's Wort family (Hypericaceae) native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as hyperforin and hypericin. The health benefits of Hypericum tomentosum var. lusitanicum include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support mental health and well-being.
